description: TUNGSTEN 9.43 SLS(20) -- INTEGRITY SEAL. Supersedes SLS(19) and both earlier files; this is now the ONLY file to compile in the d3e1191e verification chain (compile -> state invalidation -> fresh calibration -> ghost). Adds on top of SLS(19)'s 10 fixes: [1] 0xD520 guarded persistence tail (regime durations, duration flag, geometry flag -- hazard model + IC geometry now survive restarts), [2] flag distrust at all 3 CATREC activation sites, [3] CRITICAL: dangling if(!g_CalibSilent) removed -- Phase 3B.5 session training was a complete no-op in silent calibration mode, [4] session-definition sync: hour->session seed map now derived from 3B.5's own training windows, Sydney reachable, overlaps resolved by validated-regime evidence, [5] all 9 stale Regime %d/8 log strings -> %d/9, stale 32-context banner -> 36, [6] DURATION calibration learning log per regime, [7] hazard-model restore log on load, [8] regimeStrategies[9-11] formal reserved contract. Structural parity verified. Same rules: minimal fixes only if compile fails, report exact changes.
